# Settlement Conformance Suite

Runtime and source controls for deterministic settlement behavior, replay fields, conversion rules, and ledger continuity contracts.

## Requirement Family Coverage

| Family | Focus | Requirements | Unique mapped checks |
| --- | --- | ---: | ---: |
| `R-*` | Wallet summary and settlement record semantics. | `7` | `15` |
| `V-*` | Pulse-derived valuation and reference-rate determinism. | `4` | `7` |
| `S-*` | Settlement integrity, note minting, and claim gating. | `5` | `10` |
| `T-*` | Transfer posting, amount validation, nonce, and replay continuity. | `6` | `11` |
| `L-*` | Ledger continuity across private and public ledger surfaces. | `6` | `6` |

## Full Requirement Coverage

### `R-*`

Wallet summary and settlement record semantics.

<details>
<summary><code>R-001</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.wallet.ui.usd_labels` | `source` | `pass` | Wallet interface keeps USD as the user-facing display with supporting phi context. |
| `source.wallet.server.summary_fields` | `source` | `pass` | Wallet summary contract includes custody (`balancePhiMicro`) and USD presentation (`balanceUsd`) fields. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>R-002</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.wallet.server.summary_fields` | `source` | `pass` | Wallet summary contract includes custody (`balancePhiMicro`) and USD presentation (`balanceUsd`) fields. |
| `source.ledger.private.value_tuple` | `source` | `pass` | Private ledger route exposes USD, phi, and posting-rate tuple fields. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>R-003</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 4 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.amounts.rate_derivation` | `source` | `pass` | Rate derivation path is pulse-resolved and policy-driven with deterministic quantization. |
| `runtime.pulse.recomputable_no_drift` | `runtime` | `pass` | Canonical pulse resolution is recomputable and non-drifting for identical reference instants. |
| `runtime.rate.fixed_pulse_deterministic` | `runtime` | `pass` | Rate derivation at a fixed pulse is deterministic and quantizes to a positive microcent integer. |
| `runtime.rate.wallet_rate_positive` | `runtime` | `pass` | Wallet posting reference rate resolves to a strictly positive integer value. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>R-004</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 4 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.amounts.integer_conversion` | `source` | `pass` | Conversion uses fixed denominator integer arithmetic with explicit half-up rounding in both directions. |
| `runtime.conversion.phi_to_usd_half_up` | `runtime` | `pass` | Phi-to-USD conversion rounds a 0.5 cent boundary up (half-up contract). |
| `runtime.conversion.usd_to_phi_half_up` | `runtime` | `pass` | USD-to-phi conversion rounds a 0.5 boundary up (half-up contract). |
| `runtime.conversion.usd_roundtrip_tolerance` | `runtime` | `pass` | USD -> phi -> USD replay remains within 1 cent tolerance under integer rounding. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>R-005</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 3 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.ledger.private.value_tuple` | `source` | `pass` | Private ledger route exposes USD, phi, and posting-rate tuple fields. |
| `source.ledger.public.value_tuple` | `source` | `pass` | Public ledger route preserves the same value tuple fields for attestation continuity. |
| `source.notes.mint.value_tuple` | `source` | `pass` | Note mint route persists value tuple and idempotency nonce fields. |

</details>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |

## Evidence Anchors

- [settlement.conformance.json](snapshots/2026-03-28/settlement.conformance.json) contains the full imported report payload.
- `requirements[]` maps standards-level requirement IDs to check IDs.
- `checks[]` contains the source and runtime assertions and their human-readable descriptions.
- `revision` identifies the current conformance revision and the number of hashed source files in scope.
- `evidence.sourceDigests[]` in the snapshot lists the referenced live source file digests.
- `history` contains the signed snapshot metadata, badge route, and history route for this suite.
